{
  "fixed_artifact": "apiVersion: v1
kind: Pod
metadata:
  labels:
    run: attacker-pod
  name: attacker-pod
spec:
  hostPID: true
  hostIPC: true
  hostNetwork: true
  volumes:
  - name: host-fs
    hostPath:
      path: /
  containers:
  - image: ubuntu
    name: attacker-pod
    command: ["/bin/sh", "-c", "sleep infinity"]
    securityContext:
      privileged: true
      allowPrivilegeEscalation: true
      capabilities:
        drop:
          - ALL
    volumeMounts:
    - name: host-fs
      mountPath: /host
  restartPolicy: Never
",
  "patch_summary": "Added a capabilities drop ALL directive under the container's securityContext to minimize admitted capabilities as required by CKV_K8S_37.",
  "changed_resources": ["Pod.default.attacker-pod"],
  "changed_attributes": ["spec.containers[0].securityContext.capabilities.drop"]
}
attempts.fixed_text:
apiVersion: v1
kind: Pod
metadata:
  labels:
    run: attacker-pod
  name: attacker-pod
spec:
  hostPID: true
  hostIPC: true
  hostNetwork: true
  volumes:
  - name: host-fs
    hostPath:
      path: /
  containers:
  - image: ubuntu
    name: attacker-pod
    command: ["/bin/sh", "-c", "sleep infinity"]
    securityContext:
      privileged: true
      allowPrivilegeEscalation: true
      capabilities:
        drop:
          - ALL
    volumeMounts:
    - name: host-fs
      mountPath: /host
  restartPolicy: Never
